title: selaginella megaphylla
intro: Selaginella megaphylla, also known as the spikemoss, is a small, delicate plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, fever, and swelling. The health benefits of Selaginella megaphylla include its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and reduce stress. Selaginella megaphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies.
